title: Sri Mailar Mallanna
tagline: Sri Mailar Mallanna — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: Sri Shiva Mailar Mallanna Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Khandoba (also known as Mailar Mallanna and a form of the god Shiva, in Mailar or Khanapur village).
overview.description: Sri Shiva Mailar Mallanna Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Khandoba (also known as Mailar Mallanna and a form of the god Shiva, in Mailar or Khanapur village). It is situated on the Bidar-Udgir Road, 15 km from Bidar, Karnataka, India. Said temple is located within the Vijayanagara ["city of victory"] empire; which is now South India. Some of the languages spoken during this time were Kannada, Telugu, and Tamil.

topPlaces.name: Malchapur
topPlaces.description: Malchapur is a panchayat village located in Bhalki taluka of Bidar District, Karnataka, India. The village of Malchapur is 18 km by road west of the city of Bidar.

topPlaces.name: Halbarga
topPlaces.description: Halbarga is a village in Bhalki taluka of Bidar district in the Indian state of Karnataka. At the 2011 national census date, Halbarga had a population of 3,242 and a total area of 928.8 hectares.

items.note: Malchapur is a panchayat village located in Bhalki taluka of Bidar District, Karnataka, India. The village of Malchapur is 18 km by road west of the city of Bidar.
Halbarga is a village in Bhalki taluka of Bidar district in the Indian state of Karnataka. At the 2011 national census date, Halbarga had a population of 3,242 and a total area of 928.8 hectares.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Mailar Mallanna?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Mailar Mallanna is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Mailar Mallanna?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (136 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (131 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Mailar Mallanna?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Mailar Mallanna at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Mailar Mallanna?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Mailar Mallanna start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Mailar Mallanna?
faq.a: The top attractions are Malchapur, Halbarga.
